vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely inaccurate regarding current biological presence. P1 (String of Nickels) is absent/bare. P2 (Mexican Mint) is absent/bare. P3 (Pothos) is present but struggling. P4 (Silver Guest) is absent/bare.

inventory_reconciliation.P3: Present (Pothos leaf with White Rabbit anchor)

plant_audit.P1_Yellow_Pot: Empty. No evidence of String of Nickels.
plant_audit.P2_Black_Pot: Empty. No evidence of Mexican Mint.
plant_audit.P3_Black_Pot: Contains one Pothos leaf and a white rabbit figurine. The leaf shows signs of chlorosis and potential dehydration.
plant_audit.P4_Shared_Black_Pot: Empty. No evidence of Silver Guest.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Soil appears dark and potentially waterlogged or compacted. No visible fungal growth, but significant debris (eggshell fragments) present in P3.
biome_observations.desk_surface: Clean, no significant debris outside of pots.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t4: Initial state shows P3 with a single leaf and P4/P2/P1 empty or containing only debris.
temporal_deltas.t4_to_current: The Pothos leaf in P3 has remained static in position but shows signs of progressive turgor loss. No new growth or recovery observed across the sequence.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of severe decline. The lack of foliage in P1, P2, and P4 indicates total specimen loss. The remaining Pothos leaf in P3 is the only surviving biological element and appears to be in a state of terminal senescence or extreme stress.
vision_report.anomalies: Presence of crushed eggshells in P3; these are not part of the registry and constitute a 'New Introduction/Intervention'.
vision_report.narrative_description: I have performed a meticulous audit of the provided image sequence. The biome is failing. The registry is largely aspirational, as three of the four designated pots are devoid of plant life. The single Pothos leaf in P3 is the only remaining occupant, and its health is poor. The introduction of eggshells suggests an attempt at soil amendment, but it has not yielded any visible positive results. The plants are effectively lost.
